title: Jefferies Says Investors Boost ‘Nuclear Exposure’: ESG Investing
title_cn: 杰富瑞称投资者加大“核暴露”：ESG 投资
summary: Almost two-thirds of fund managers permit some level of “nuclear exposure,” with 34% allowing investments in nuclear weaponry, according to Jefferies Financial Group Inc.’s fourth-annual ESG and defense survey.

title: EU Chamber on Business Confidence in China
title_cn: 中国欧盟商会商业信心
summary: Jens Eskelund, President of the European Union Chamber of Commerce in China, tells Bloomberg’s The China Snow that the business group's latest survey shows an "inflection point" in confidence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Everybody Wants Fed Independence, Rubenstein Says
title_cn: 鲁宾斯坦表示，每个人都希望美联储独立
summary: Carlyle Co-Founder and Co-Chairman David Rubenstein discusses his outlook for interest rates and his expectations of the Federal Reserve under Chair Kevin Warsh. He also shares his views on investing with Stephen Engle from the sidelines of the UBS Asian Investment Conference in Hong Kong.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: HK-Traded Insilico Medicine Is Said to Explore UAE Listing
title_cn: 据称在香港上市的 Insilico Medicine 将探索在阿联酋上市
summary: Insilico Medicine Cayman TopCo is considering a second listing in Abu Dhabi, according to people familiar with the matter, which would make it the first company from outside of the Gulf to list shares on a regional exchange.

title: Gold Holds Loss as Traders Weigh Prospects for US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 交易员权衡美伊协议前景，金价维持跌势
summary: Gold held a loss, as fresh clashes in the Persian Gulf weighed on hopes for a US-Iran peace deal and reinforced concerns that inflation could keep interest rates higher for longer.

title: Ex-Fed Official Evans on What's Next for Monetary Policy
title_cn: 前美联储官员埃文斯谈货币政策的下一步
summary:
Former Chicago Fed President Charles Evans discusses what's next for monetary policy.
Evans, who ran the Chicago Fed for 16 years until 2023, emphasizes that monetary policy ahead will likely remain cautious, balancing inflation risks with growth concerns. He speaks with Stephen Engle from the sidelines of the 'UBS Asian Investment Conference' in Hong Kong. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Hynix, Micron Join $1 Trillion Market Cap Club | The Asia Trade 5/27/2026
title_cn: SK 海力士、美光加入 1 万亿美元市值俱乐部 |亚洲贸易 5/27/2026
summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Adnoc Exports Another LNG Shipment Through Hormuz to India
title_cn: 阿布扎比国家石油公司通过霍尔木兹海峡向印度出口另一批液化天然气
summary: Another tanker carrying liquefied natural gas from Abu Dhabi National Oil Co. has exited the Strait of Hormuz, adding to a recent uptick in energy flows through the vital waterway.

title: ASX Shares Eye Decade Low After Cost Woes Fuel Profit Downgrades
title_cn: 成本问题导致利润下调后，澳交所股价跌至十年低点
summary: ASX Ltd. shares have tumbled to their lowest level in almost a decade after rising costs prompted several brokers to trim their earnings outlooks for Australia’s beleaguered exchange operator.

title: Defense Billionaire’s Father Builds New Business on CSG Model
title_cn: 国防亿万富翁的父亲以南玻集团模式打造新业务
summary: The founder of CSG NV, which completed the biggest ever initial public offering for a pure defense company four months ago, is seeking to raise as much as €200 million ($233 million) this year to expand his industrial group.

title: Korean Stocks Surge 100% in 2026 to Surpass Dotcom Era Gains
title_cn: 韩国股市 2026 年飙升 100%，超越互联网时代涨幅
summary: The breathtaking rally in South Korean stocks took gains for 2026 to 100%, eclipsing even the historic run-ups seen before the dotcom bubble burst and during the nation’s industrial boom in the late 1980s.

title: Oil Dips as US Sees Progress in Iran Deal Despite Fresh Tensions
title_cn: 尽管出现新的紧张局势，美国仍看到伊朗协议取得进展，油价下跌
summary: Oil dropped on optimism that the US and Iran will reach a peace deal despite fresh hostilities and uncertainty over the vital Strait of Hormuz.

title: Japan’s 40-Year Bond Sale Draws Strong Demand on Higher Yields
title_cn: 日本40年期债券发行引发对更高收益率的强劲需求
summary: Japan’s 40-year government bond auction drew stronger demand than its 12-month average, as higher yields attracted investors despite inflation concerns driven by the Middle East conflict.

title: Samsung Workers Accept Wage Deal That Averts Chip Plant Strike
title_cn: 三星工人接受工资协议以避免芯片厂罢工
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. union members voted in favor of a compensation deal that will hand chip workers an average bonus of about $340,000, staving off a strike that threatened to disrupt global chip supply.

title: Thailand Eyes $5 Billion From Notes, Loans as Bond Yields Soar
title_cn: 随着债券收益率飙升，泰国计划通过票据和贷款筹集 50 亿美元
summary: Thailand plans to raise about $5 billion through a mix of promissory notes and term loans to fund a raft of measures to ease living costs, shunning bonds after the Iran war sent sovereign yields to multi-month highs.

title: The Chips Are All-In for the Trillion-Dollar Club
title_cn: 筹码已全部投入万亿美元俱乐部
summary: Boom makes Micron and SK Hynix the newest members.

title: Global Aluminum Rally Could Draw Record Exports From China
title_cn: 全球铝价上涨可能吸引中国创纪录的出口
summary: The rally in the global aluminum market could spur record exports of the metal from China, where elevated prices are capping consumption.

title: Memory Chip Frenzy Sends SK Hynix, Micron Into $1 Trillion Club
title_cn: 存储芯片狂潮让 SK 海力士、美光进入 1 万亿美元俱乐部
summary: The breakneck surge in memory-chip stocks is intensifying, sending the market capitalizations of SK Hynix Inc. and Micron Technology Inc. above $1 trillion for the first time, as investors bet the AI boom will lead to a sustained revaluation of the industry.

title: UBS' Khan on China Business, AI Impact and Middle East (Full Interview)
title_cn: 瑞银集团可汗谈中国商业、人工智能影响和中东（完整采访）
summary: UBS Group AG’s Asia Pacific President Iqbal Khan discusses the China market, potential impact of AI on jobs and how the bank is navigating geopolitical turmoil. He speaks with Bloomberg's Stephen Engle in Hong Kong. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Base Metals Advance as US Touts Progress Toward Iran Peace Deal
title_cn: 美国宣扬伊朗和平协议取得进展，基本金属上涨
summary: Copper climbed and aluminum was on track for its highest close in four years on cautious optimism that the US and Iran could reach a peace deal, despite a fresh flare-up of hostilities in the Persian Gulf.

title: UBS’ Khan Says AI Will Impact Jobs While Aiding Productivity
title_cn: 瑞银集团 (UBS) 的可汗表示，人工智能将在提高生产力的同时影响工作
summary: UBS Group AG’s Asia Pacific President Iqbal Khan said artificial intelligence will free up capacity and improve productivity but also have an impact on jobs.

title: China Bond Bears Eye Niche Swap Trade as Rally Doubts Grow
title_cn: 随着反弹疑虑加剧，中国债券空头关注利基掉期交易
summary: Chinese investors are betting a months-long rally in two-year government bonds has gone too far, turning to arbitrage trades more commonly used in the US and Europe to put that view to work.

title: Astellas Pharma Shares Fall After Unveiling Five-Year Plan
title_cn: 安斯泰来制药公布五年计划后股价下跌
summary: Astellas Pharma Inc. shares fell to the lowest in about four months after the Tokyo-based drugmaker’s five-year plan offered few surprises.

title: EU Firms Warm to China Even as Tensions Spiral Over Export Surge
title_cn: 尽管出口激增导致紧张局势升级，欧盟企业仍对中国表现出热情
summary: European firms in China are turning more upbeat about their business outlook, a new survey found, just as Brussels appears poised to take action against a swelling trade imbalance with Beijing.

title: Insurance Mogul Lindberg Gets 12 Years for $2 Billion Fraud
title_cn: 保险大亨林德伯格因诈骗 20 亿美元被判 12 年徒刑
summary: North Carolina investment firm founder Greg Lindberg was sentenced Tuesday to 12 years in prison for siphoning more than $2 billion in reserves backing insurance policies and using the proceeds to pay for jets, mansions and a 214-foot yacht.

title: Iqbal Khan on Geopolitics, AI, and Growth
title_cn: 伊克巴尔·汗谈地缘政治、人工智能和增长
summary: UBS Asia Pacific Co-President of Global Wealth Management Iqbal Khan speaks to Bloomberg's Stephen Engle as the UBS Asian Investment Conference kicks off in Hong Kong. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Touts Iran Deal Prospects Amid Fresh Hormuz Tensions
title_cn: 在新的霍尔木兹紧张局势中，美国吹捧伊朗协议前景
summary: The US is touting progress toward a peace deal with Iran to end the nearly three-month war, despite fresh hostilities and uncertainty over the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg's Derek Wallbank has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Huawei’s New Chipmaking Plan Has Investors Buzzing
title_cn: 为什么华为的新芯片制造计划引起投资者热议
summary: The artificial intelligence boom has triggered an insatiable demand for computing power, with companies such as Amazon.com Inc., Meta Platforms Inc. and Microsoft Corp. pouring hundreds of billions of dollars into data centers and advanced chips developed by US semiconductor giant Nvidia Corp.

title: Singapore Hands Byju's Founder His First Ever Jail Term
title_cn: 新加坡让 Byju 创始人首次入狱
summary: The fallen billionaire was sentenced to six months in jail for contempt of court.

title: Risk of Potential Liquidity Overhang in AI: GGL Capital
title_cn: 人工智能领域潜在流动性过剩的风险：GGL Capital
summary: Gigi Luk of GGL Capital Investment Group says "one risk that we're seeing is the potential liquidity overhang in AI." Luk adds that "the gap between winners and losers is widening structurally" and this creates opportunities. She speaks on Bloomberg Television.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Verisilicon Chairman on Growth Outlook
title_cn: 芯原科技董事长谈增长前景
summary:
Wayne Dai, Chairman of Verisilicon, discusses the outlook for business and growth, as the Chinese chip stocks in China outperform global peers.
He speaks exclusively with Stephen Engle on the sidelines of the UBS Asian Investment Conference in Hong Kong on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mizuho Financial Group CEO on BOJ Outlook
title_cn: 瑞穗金融集团首席执行官谈日本央行展望
summary:
Masahiro Kihara, President & Group CEO at Mizuho Financial Group, expects the BOJ to raise rates in June or July. He also discusses the outlook for business as the bank forecasts another year of profit growth.
He speaks with Shery Ahn on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade".
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mythos Risk Prompts India to Test for Financial Software Flaws
title_cn: 神话风险促使印度测试金融软件缺陷
summary: India is undertaking tests of some of its most sensitive public-facing financial and government application software to better understand their vulnerabilities to Anthropic PBC’s next-generation Mythos AI model, according to Indian officials familiar with the matter.

title: Taiwan Said to Suspect Nvidia Chips Smuggled to China Via Japan
title_cn: 台湾怀疑英伟达芯片经日本走私至中国
summary: Taiwan prosecutors suspect that three individuals successfully smuggled at least one shipment of Nvidia Corp. AI chips to China after first exporting them to Japan, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Memory Chip Frenzy Sends SK Hynix Into $1 Trillion Club
title_cn: 存储芯片狂潮让 SK 海力士跻身 1 万亿美元俱乐部
summary: The breakneck surge in memory-chip stocks is intensifying, sending the market capitalizations of SK Hynix and Micron Technology above $1 trillion for the first time, as investors bet the AI boom will lead to a sustained revaluation of the industry. Bloomberg's David Savage breaks down the trends. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fireworks AI in Talks for Funding at $15 Billion Valuation
title_cn: Fireworks AI 正在洽谈估值 150 亿美元的融资
summary: Fireworks AI, a startup that helps companies run artificial intelligence models, is in talks to raise a new round of funding that would value the company at $15 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Volvo Car Avoids US Ban on Connected Vehicles Tied to China
title_cn: 沃尔沃汽车避开美国对中国联网汽车的禁令
summary: The Trump administration reached an agreement with Volvo Car AB that will allow the automaker to avoid a US ban on connected vehicles tied to China.

title: Slim to Invest $5 Billion This Year, Won’t Seek New Pemex Bets
title_cn: Slim今年将投资50亿美元，不会寻求新的Pemex赌注
summary: Mexican billionaire Carlos Slim is planning to invest around $5 billion this year but will steer clear of new ventures with oil driller Petroleos Mexicanos, the 86-year-old chairman emeritus of Grupo Carso said Tuesday.

title: Stocks Rise Toward Record on Iran Peace Hopes | The Close 5/26/2026
title_cn: 伊朗和平希望推动股市上涨创历史新高收盘价 2026 年 5 月 26 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Fidelity Director of Global Macro Jurrien Timmer, EquiLend Managing Director Head of Data & Insights Nancy Allen, Barclay’s Managing Director Senior Retail Analyst Adrienne Yih, Davidson Kempner Managing Partner & CIO Tony Yoseloff, Deutsche Bank’s Chief US Equity & Global Strategist Binky Chadha, Valoir CEO Rebecca Wettemann, Janus Henderson’s John Lloyd, Cain CEO Jonathan Goldstein, & Stord Co-Founder CEO Sean Henry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rocket, Satellite Stocks Surge as SpaceX IPO Fuels Euphoria
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股助推火箭和卫星股票飙升
summary: Space and satellite-related stocks soared Tuesday as investor enthusiasm around the industry intensified.

title: SEC Chief Atkins Pumps the Brakes on Prediction-Market Funds
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会主席阿特金斯对预测市场基金踩刹车
summary: Bloomberg's Vildana Hajric and Bloomberg Intelligence's James Seyffart join Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The top US securities regulator is delaying the launch of a wave of novel exchange-traded funds that would let investors wager on events such as elections and economic data as the agency weighs how far the $15 trillion ETF wrapper can stretch. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX Has More Bitcoin Than Estimated, SEC Filing Shows
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会 (SEC) 文件显示，埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 拥有的比特币数量超出预期
summary: Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow joins Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Elon Musk’s SpaceX holds more than twice as much Bitcoin as previously estimated. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Tops $1 Trillion in Value as UBS Says Stock Could Double
title_cn: 瑞银称美光股价可能翻倍，市值突破 1 万亿美元
summary: Micron Technology Inc.’s market capitalization, which has soared about 840% over the past year, will more than double over the next 12 months, according to at least one analyst.

title: Nine Crypto Whales Dominate Polymarket Disputes Worth Billions
title_cn: 九只加密鲸鱼主导了价值数十亿美元的综合市场纠纷
summary: Bloomberg's Andre Tartar joins Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Nine anonymous cryptocurrency wallets have effectively gained control over who wins and loses on Polymarket’s most contested prediction market bets, giving a tiny group of unappointed people outsized power over billions of dollars of wagers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kaiko CEO Discusses Events-Driven Contract Infrastructure
title_cn: Kaiko 首席执行官讨论事件驱动的合约基础设施
summary: Ambre Soubiran, CEO of Kaiko, joins Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss the rapid growth of prediction markets and how data is key for the industry's infrastructure.   (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Prediction Regulation 'Needs Fine-Tuning': Fmr. CFTC Chair
title_cn: 预测调节“需要微调”：Fmr。美国商品期货交易委员会主席
summary: Christopher Giancarlo, incoming senior adviser investment banking at Jefferies and former CFTC chair, joins Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss prediction markets, regulating digital assets, and resources at the CFTC. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Gets Boost on Tight Chip Supplies, Pilling Says
title_cn: 皮林表示，美光因芯片供应紧张而获得提振
summary: Daniel Pilling, a portfolio manager at Sands Capital Management LLC, says the rally for Micron Technology Inc. shares is a reflection of how demand for artificial intelligence chips is outstripping supply. He speaks with Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde on ``Bloomberg Tech.'' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Volatility At 9-Month Low, CFTC 'Crypto Dad' Joins Jefferies | Bloomberg Crypto 5/26/2026
title_cn: 比特币波动率创 9 个月低点，CFTC“加密货币之父”加入 Jefferies |彭博加密货币 2026 年 5 月 26 日
summary: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. Today's guests: Pantera Capital Management Chief Legal Officer Katrina Paglia, Jefferies Incoming Senior Advisor Investment Banking Christopher Giancarlo, and Kaiko CEO Ambre Soubiran.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SEC Delays Plan Allowing for Crypto Versions of US Stocks
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会推迟允许美国股票加密版本的计划
summary: Bloomberg's Scott Patterson joins Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The SEC is delaying a plan to provide broad exemptions for US crypto firms to trade tokenized assets linked to stocks, according to people familiar with the matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SEC Chief Atkins Pumps the Brakes on Prediction-Market Funds
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会主席阿特金斯对预测市场基金踩刹车
summary: Bloomberg's Vildana Hajric and Bloomberg Intelligence's James Seyffart join Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The top US securities regulator is delaying the launch of a wave of novel exchange-traded funds that would let investors wager on events such as elections and economic data as the agency weighs how far the $15 trillion ETF wrapper can stretch. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Expands Travel Curbs to Top AI Talent | Bloomberg Tech 5/26/2026
title_cn: 中国扩大对顶尖人工智能人才的旅行限制彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 26 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss how China is tightening its grip on AI by targeting top AI professionals' overseas travel. Plus, big banks are looking to hire more AI specialists and shrink traditional banking roles, and SpaceX kicks off a tech IPO bonanza. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Revel to Merge With EQT-Backed Voltera, Uniting EV Charging Networks
title_cn: Revel 将与 EQT 支持的 Voltera 合并，联合电动汽车充电网络
summary: Private equity-backed Voltera and Revel Transit Inc. have agreed to merge their electric-vehicle charging businesses to serve ride-hail cars and robotaxis across urban areas in the US.

title: The Cost of Teaching Wall Street Bankers to Use AI Tools
title_cn: 教华尔街银行家使用人工智能工具的成本
summary: As Wall Street is getting caught up in AI angst and looking to hire more AI specialists and shrink traditional banking roles, two highly sought-after AI trainers in finance are charging $25,000 for a day of training. Bloomberg's Sally Bakewell joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow for more on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Has Competitive Advantage Ahead of IPO, Says 'Mr. IPO'
title_cn: “SpaceX 先生在 IPO 之前拥有竞争优势”首次公开募股'
summary: Jay Ritter, University of Florida emeritus professor and director of the IPO Initiative, known as “Mr. IPO” for his work on initial public offerings, joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." to discuss SpaceX's IPO. It is set to be "the largest private-sector company ever to go public," for the broader tech IPO landscape, he says. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Stalls Airbus Deliveries to Push Europe on Comac Jets
title_cn: 中国暂停空客交付以推动中国商飞飞机向欧洲供应
summary: China has been slow-walking approval of Airbus SE plane deliveries to signal impatience with how long European regulators are taking to certify Chinese-made aircraft, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Trump's Pick Paxton Defeats Cornyn in Texas Primary
title_cn: 特朗普的选择帕克斯顿在德克萨斯州初选中击败科宁
summary: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton won the state’s Republican Senate runoff, defeating four-term incumbent John Cornyn and setting the stage for a November showdown with Democrat James Talarico. Paxton clinched the nomination a week after securing an endorsement from President Donald Trump in one of the most expensive primaries in Senate history. Bloomberg's Jon Herskovitz reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mozambique Disputes $2 Billion Claims for Total LNG Project
title_cn: 莫桑比克对总液化天然气项目20亿美元索赔提出争议
summary: Mozambique is disputing $2 billion in costs that TotalEnergies SE and its partners say they incurred during a years-long stoppage of their liquefied natural gas project that’s under construction in the southeast Africa nation, according to a person with knowledge of the matter.

title: Switzerland’s 10-Million Population Cap Is Worrying Executives
title_cn: 瑞士 1000 万人口上限令高管们担忧
summary: The initiative to limit immigration has strong support ahead of a June ballot.

title: Andy Burnham’s Boom in Manchester and the Areas It Left Behind
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆 (Andy Burnham) 在曼彻斯特及其留下的地区的繁荣
summary: Andy Burnham, the hot favorite to be Britain’s next prime minister, has boasted of a growth miracle in Greater Manchester where he’s been mayor for just under a decade.

title: Paxton Trounces Cornyn in Texas Runoff After Winning Trump Nod
title_cn: 帕克斯顿赢得特朗普点头后在德克萨斯州决选中击败科宁
summary: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton stormed to a blowout victory in the state’s Republican Senate runoff, handily defeating four-term incumbent John Cornyn and setting the stage for a November showdown with a well-funded Democrat, James Talarico.

title: Ex-President Biden Sues to Stop DOJ Sharing Interview Tapes
title_cn: 前总统拜登起诉阻止司法部分享采访录音
summary: Former President Joe Biden is suing the US Justice Department to block officials from sharing audio recordings and interview transcripts he gave for a memoir project with Republicans in Congress and a conservative advocacy group.

title: Texas Voters Get Last Say After Trump Backs Paxton in Runoff
title_cn: 特朗普在决选中支持帕克斯顿后，德克萨斯州选民获得最后发言权
summary: Republican voters in Texas get their final say Tuesday in a drawn out, vitriolic and expensive primary campaign for a US Senate seat, a race that Democrats are watching closely in hopes that they could flip both houses of Congress in November.

title: Germany, Canada to Sign Major LNG Deal as Europe Seeks Energy Security
title_cn: 欧洲寻求能源安全，德国和加拿大将签署重大液化天然气协议
summary: Canada has reached a deal to supply Germany with liquefied natural gas from a planned facility on the west coast, a boost for Prime Minister Mark Carney, who wants to double the country’s exports to non-US markets.

title: Texas Showdown Latest Test of Trump's Sway | Balance of Power: Late Edition 5/26/2026
title_cn: 德克萨斯州对决对特朗普影响力的最新考验|权力平衡：最新版 2026 年 5 月 26 日
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Sen. Rick Scott (R-FL) discusses the ongoing negotiations between the US and Iran, the blowback on President Trump's 'weaponization' fund, as well as the Texas Republican runoff election. Michael Allen, Beacon Global Strategies Managing Director, speaks on the situation in the Middle East and how the handling of the conflict may reflect on President Trump and his allies in time. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sen. Scott: Trump Won’t Punt Iran Nuclear Demands
title_cn: 参议员斯科特：特朗普不会拒绝伊朗的核要求
summary: Senator Rick Scott (R-FL), a member of the Senate Foreign Relations and Armed Services Committees, says he would be “shocked” if President Trump agreed to delay the nuclear component of any Iran deal, warning the choice is “unbelievable hostilities or a deal” and saying more military strikes may be needed to eliminate Iran’s nuclear capability. He also backs Trump’s proposed weaponization fund while saying he won’t seek taxpayer compensation himself, predicts Raúl Castro will leave Cuba before the US “pick[s] him up,” and says Republicans will hold Texas despite the bruising Cornyn-Paxton primary. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SEC Chairman Eyes ‘Gun-Jumping’ Rule Changes to Spur More IPOs
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会主席着眼于“抢先一步”的规则变化以刺激更多首次公开募股
summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission is mulling changes to decades-old rules that prohibit companies from certain communications during the going-public process, as the Wall Street regulator looks to boost initial public offerings.

title: US Says Process to Form China Board of Trade to Start Shortly
title_cn: 美国表示组建中国贸易委员会的程序即将启动
summary: US Trade Ambassador Jamieson Greer said his agency would issue a notice in the Federal Register “shortly” to seek public comments on a Board of Trade with China, a formal step to establish a new mechanism to manage economic relations between the two nations.

title: Michael Allen: 'Decreasing Number of Options' on Iran
title_cn: 迈克尔·艾伦：伊朗问题“选项数量减少”
summary: Michael Allen, Beacon Global Strategies Managing Director, says President Trump and his team have a decreasing number of options to secure a deal with Iran, citing concerns that any agreement could be vague and may not deliver the concessions the US needs. Allen also says Operation Epic Fury and the subsequent conflict could end up being a strategic loss for the United States if the US is unable to reopen or neutralize the Strait. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rubio Seeks to Repair US-India Relations After Trump-Era Strains
title_cn: 卢比奥寻求在特朗普时代紧张后修复美印关系
summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio’s four-day visit to India featured warm handshakes and promises of deeper cooperation. There was even a surprise call by President Donald Trump to a US embassy-sponsored bash in New Delhi, where he told guests how much he loved the country.

title: UK Spy Chief Warns China Is Closing Cyber Gap With West
title_cn: 英国间谍头子警告中国正在缩小与西方的网络差距
summary: The UK and other western nations are running out of time to maintain their technological edge over China, the UK’s top cyber spy is set to warn Wednesday, urging businesses to work with intelligence officials in order to stay ahead.

title: Trump Meets Brazil Candidate Flávio Bolsonaro at White House
title_cn: 特朗普在白宫会见巴西候选人弗拉维奥·博尔索纳罗
summary: President Donald Trump met Tuesday with Flávio Bolsonaro, the top challenger to leftist incumbent Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva in Brazil’s October presidential election.

title: Brazil Signals It Will Ease Rules to Bolster Brasilia’s Bank
title_cn: 巴西表示将放宽规则以支持巴西利亚银行
summary: Brazil’s Finance ministry signaled that it will help strengthen the regional bank controlled by the nation’s capital city after the lender was hurt by the fallout from the failure of Banco Master SA.

title: UK, Poland Sign Defense and Security Pact to Curb Russia Threat
title_cn: 英国与波兰签署防务与安全协议遏制俄罗斯威胁
summary: The UK is poised to sign a new defense and security pact with Poland, as the NATO allies seek to curb the threat posed by Russia.

title: Blair Urges Labour to Find ‘Coherent Plan’ Before Ousting Leader
title_cn: 布莱尔敦促工党在罢免领导人之前找到“一致的计划”
summary: Former Labour Prime Minister Tony Blair criticized the party he once led for “playing with fire” in its attempt to oust current premier Keir Starmer, while also slamming the government for lacking a clear agenda.

title: Brazil Police Raid Ex-Rio Governor’s Home in Master Probe
title_cn: 巴西警方突击搜查里约前州长住宅
summary: Brazil’s federal police carried out search-and-seizure warrants against former Rio de Janeiro Governor Cláudio Castro as part of a new phase of the investigation into failed lender Banco Master SA.

title: What Trump’s Venezuela Blueprint Means for Cuba
title_cn: 特朗普的委内瑞拉蓝图对古巴意味着什么
summary: Can Cuba withstand mounting US pressure? On the Big Take: the campaign to cripple Cuba’s government and why US intervention in Venezuela may be a blueprint for Havana’s future.

title: Texas Republicans Make Their Choice in Bitter Senate Contest
title_cn: 德克萨斯州共和党人在激烈的参议院竞选中做出选择
summary: Trump-backed Paxton is facing off against incumbent Cornyn in a runoff.

title: US Consumer Confidence Slips on Price Concerns| Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 5/26/2026
title_cn: 美国消费者信心因价格担忧而下滑|彭博商业周刊日报 5/26/2026
summary: Today, Chris Kennedy, Bloomberg Economics lead on economic statecraft, breaks down the latest in negotiations between the US and Iran as the two sides traded renewed strikes over the weekend. Then, Peter Atwater, president of Financial Insyghts, discusses the 'K-shaped economy' as war fueled inflation squeezes consumers across the US. Plus, Louise Phillips Forbes discusses New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's proposed pied-a-terre tax and what it could mean for the real estate market. Finally, Michael Swanson, chief agriculture economist at Wells Fargo's Agri-Food Institute, talks the impact of supply chain disruption and higher fuel prices on farmers and consumers at the grocery store and at the dinner table. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Indonesia’s $15 Billion Free Lunch Program Is Unnerving Investors
title_cn: 为什么印度尼西亚 150 亿美元的免费午餐计划令投资者感到不安
summary: On the Big Take Asia podcast: What it takes to feed tens of millions of Indonesians and why Prabowo’s signature program is under pressure.

title: Canada’s Legal Fight Over Indigenous Lands
title_cn: 加拿大对土著土地的法律斗争
summary: A landmark ruling recognizing Indigenous rights over 800 acres of metro Vancouver has triggered political upheaval in Canada. The government now must reconcile Aboriginal title with existing owners. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Touts Iran Deal Prospects | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/26/2026
title_cn: 美国吹捧伊朗协议前景|权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 5 月 26 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss peace negotiations between the US and Iran. On today's show, former State Department official Heather Conley, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino, BGR Group Principal Lester Munson, Lockheed Martin President Tim Cahill and Texas Politics Project Director James Henson. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former Greek Premier Tsipras Forms New Party Ahead of Election
title_cn: 希腊前总理齐普拉斯在选举前组建新政党
summary: Former Greek Prime Minister Alexis Tsipras announced the formation of a new party, adding to the country’s fragmented political landscape as it enters an election year.

title: Outlook for Future is 'Divided' Between Sides of 'K-Shaped' Economy, Says Peter Atwater
title_cn: 彼得·阿特沃特表示，“K 型”经济的未来前景“分裂”
summary: Peter Atwater, president at Financial Insyghts and lecturer at William & Mary College, said that the top and bottom of the 'K-shaped economy' have become two vastly different experiences with 'nothing in common' as consumers on the bottom leg of the 'K' feel the daily impact of war fueled inflation and a labor market impacted by AI. Atwater says that the affordability crunch at the bottom of the 'K' will likely result in political turnover in midterm elections this fall.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China’s Plans for an Urban Super City
title_cn: 中国的超级城市计划
summary: China’s Greater Bay Area will fuse 11 cities into a megalopolis that includes Hong Kong, which Beijing hopes will become a new Silicon Valley. But the plan is part of a much larger transformation. (Source: Bloomberg)
